title: Vansda National Park
tagline: Vansda National Park — wildlife reserve of Gujarat

overview.short: Vansda National Park, also known as Bansda National Park, is a protected area which represents the thick woodlands of the Dangs and southern Gujarat, and is situated in the Vansda
overview.description: Vansda National Park, also known as Bansda National Park, is a protected area which represents the thick woodlands of the Dangs and southern Gujarat, and is situated in the Vansda tehsil, Navsari District of Gujarat state, India. Riding on the banks of Ambika River and measuring roughly 24 km2 in area, the park lies about 65 km east of the town of Chikhali on the National Highway 48, and about 80 km northeast of the city of Valsad. Vansda, the town from which the name of the park is derived, is an important trading place for the surrounding area where the majority of the population is represen

topPlaces.name: Waghai
topPlaces.description: Waghai is a town in the Dang District of the southern part of Gujarat state in India. And also Taluka of dang district.

topPlaces.name: Bansda State
topPlaces.description: Bansda State was one of the princely states of India during the period of the British Raj. It was under the Surat Agency of the Bombay Presidency.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vansda National Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vansda National Park is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vansda National Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Surat Airport (86 km) and the nearest railway station is Surat Railway Station (83 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vansda National Park?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vansda National Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vansda National Park?
faq.a: Stays in Vansda National Park start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vansda National Park?
faq.a: The top attractions are Waghai, Bansda State.
